data.title: Former Signature Bank executives introduce new blockchain-based bank N3XT, promising instant 24/7 payments on private blockchain.
data.description: Scott Shay, the founder of Signature Bank, has recently launched a new venture called N3XT. This bank is designed to offer instantaneous 24-hour payment services utilizing a private blockchain.
RBI CUTS FY26 INFLATION VIEW TO 2%, RAISES GDP VIEW TO 7.3%

data.title: Gold and silver surge as investors hedge against possible Fed error, with Bitcoin lagging behind in market reassessment.
data.description: Investors are cautious amid concerns about a possible misstep by the Federal Reserve, leading to an increase in the prices of gold and silver. Meanwhile, Bitcoin is experiencing a slower growth as traders reevaluate the associated risks. This shift in sentiment is reflected in the market dynamics as gold and silver prices surge, while Bitcoin fails to keep pace with these gains. This trend highlights the ongoing uncertainty and volatility in the financial markets as investors navigate the potential impact of Federal Reserve decisions.

data.title: TransThera published tinengotinib study results for Cholangiocarcinoma on Lancet. Important numbers: Phase 2 trial, Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, TransThera Sciences Inc. disclosed the release of clinical findings from a Phase 2 trial conducted in the United States regarding tinengotinib for Cholangiocarcinoma patients. The results were published in The Lancet Gastroenterology. The study focused on the efficacy of tinengotinib in treating CCA. The company is based in Nanjing, China, while the trial took place in Gaithersburg, Maryland. This announcement highlights significant progress in research and development within the medical field, showcasing promising implications for patients suffering from this type of cancer.
